sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 15.42 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.15)

statement.latex: Is it true that the group algebra$k[F]$of R.\,Thompson's group$F$(see 12.20) over a field$k$satisfies the Ore condition, that is, for any$a,b k[F]$there exist$u,v k[F]$such that$au=bv$and either$u$or$v$is nonzero? If the answer is negative, then$F$is not amenable. Comment of 2026: If the answer is positive, then$F$is amenable (so problem 15.42 is equivalent to 12.20), because the ``if and only if'...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
